articles.title: Hong Kong Government Workers to Get 2% Pay Rise This Year
articles.summary: Hong Kong's government has decided to give all civil servants — people who work for the government — a 2% pay increase this year. This means their monthly salaries will go up by 2%, starting from April 1. The decision was made by the city's top advisory body, the Executive Council. A survey of private companies had actually suggested higher rises — up to 4.12% for senior staff. However, officials said they need to be careful with public money, especially because the global situation is uncertain. The pay rise will cost the government around HK$6 billion extra. Workers' representatives will be consulted before a final decision is made.

lv1: How much is the pay rise that Hong Kong civil servants are proposed to receive this year? (香港公務員今年建議加薪多少百分比？)
Who made the decision about the civil servants' pay rise? (誰決定了公務員的加薪方案？)
lv2: Why did the government decide on a flat 2% rise instead of following the higher rates suggested by the Pay Trend Survey? (為甚麼政府決定劃一加薪2%，而不是跟隨薪酬趨勢調查所建議的較高加幅？)
How do you think civil servants who work at a junior level might feel about this pay rise, and why? (你認為初級公務員對這次加薪結果會有甚麼感受？原因是甚麼？)
lv3: Should the government always follow pay survey results when deciding civil service pay rises, or are there times when it is right to offer less? Give reasons for your view. (政府在決定公務員加薪時，是否應該完全跟隨薪酬調查結果？在甚麼情況下給予較低加幅是合理的？請說明你的立場。)

Some people argue that public servants should earn less than private sector workers, while others believe their pay should be competitive to attract talent. Which view do you find more convincing, and why? (有人認為公務員薪酬應低於私人市場，也有人認為應具競爭力以吸引人才。你較認同哪個觀點？原因是甚麼？)

articles.title: Seven People Charged After Deadly Tai Po Housing Estate Fire
articles.summary: Hong Kong police and the anti-corruption agency ICAC have together charged seven individuals and two companies with a total of 25 criminal offences connected to a deadly fire at Hung Fuk Estate in Tai Po. The charges include manslaughter, conspiracy to defraud, and money laundering. The case was heard at West Kowloon Magistrates' Courts today. Investigators looked into both the cause of the fire and suspected corruption linked to a major renovation project at the housing estate. The joint investigation team was set up specially to look into all aspects of this serious case, which shocked the city when it happened.

lv1: How many people were charged in connection with the Hung Fuk Estate fire? (有多少人因宏福苑大火案被起訴？)
Which two organisations worked together to investigate this case? (哪兩個機構合作調查這宗案件？)
lv2: Why do you think it was important for both the police and ICAC to jointly investigate this fire case? (你認為為甚麼警方和廉政公署需要聯合調查這宗火災案件？)
What does it mean to be charged with 'manslaughter', and how is it different from murder? (被控「誤殺」是甚麼意思？它與謀殺有甚麼分別？)
lv3: When a deadly accident involves both safety failures and suspected corruption, who do you think should bear the greatest responsibility — building contractors, government inspectors, or property management companies? Explain your reasoning. (當一宗致命意外同時涉及安全失誤及懷疑貪污時，你認為誰應負上最大責任——建築承辦商、政府巡查人員還是物業管理公司？請說明你的理由。)

How can Hong Kong strengthen the oversight of building maintenance and renovation projects to prevent future tragedies? Do you think current laws are tough enough? (香港應如何加強監管樓宇維修工程以防止悲劇再次發生？你認為現行法例是否已足夠嚴厲？)

articles.title: 香港公務員獲建議劃一加薪2% 工會批低於預期
articles.summary: 香港行政會議建議今年為各職級公務員劃一加薪2%，由今年4月1日起生效。公務員事務局局長楊何蓓茵表示，決定時考慮了香港經濟狀況、生活費變化及政府財政等多項因素，並強調須審慎理財。然而，今年的薪酬趨勢調查建議高層加薪4.12%、中層2.64%、低層1.17%，因此部分工會認為高、中層職員的實際加幅低於調查建議，對方案表示失望。政府表示將與職方代表會面聽取意見，再作最終決定。

lv1: 行政會議建議公務員今年加薪多少百分比？
這次加薪從哪一日起生效？
lv2: 為甚麼部分公務員工會對這次加薪方案感到失望？
政府在決定加薪幅度時，會考慮哪些因素？
lv3: 有意見認為公務員薪酬調整應完全跟隨薪酬趨勢調查結果，你同意嗎？政府是否有充分理由給予低於調查建議的加幅？
公務員的薪酬水平會如何影響政府吸引及留住人才的能力？若薪酬長期偏低，對香港公共服務質素會有甚麼影響？

articles.title: 宏福苑大火案：警廉聯合起訴7人及兩公司共25項控罪
articles.summary: 警方與廉政公署組成的聯合調查小組，今日（6月10日）就大埔宏福苑致命火災，正式落案起訴七名人士及兩間公司，合共涉及25項控罪，包括誤殺、串謀詐騙及洗黑錢等嚴重罪行。案件已在西九龍裁判法院提堂處理。調查範圍涵蓋火災的起因，以及屋苑進行大規模維修工程期間疑涉貪污的問題。事件引起社會廣泛關注，當局表示會嚴肅跟進。

lv1: 今次宏福苑大火案共涉及多少項控罪？
lv2: 為甚麼警方和廉署要成立聯合調查小組來處理這宗火災案？
「洗黑錢」是甚麼意思？為甚麼這是一項嚴重罪行？
lv3: 假如維修工程中涉及貪污，對居民安全構成甚麼風險？香港應如何加強對公共屋苑維修工程的監管？
有人認為重判貪污及安全失職者，才能有效阻嚇同類事件再發生；也有人認為制度改革比刑罰更重要。你認為哪種方法更能保障市民安全？
